metadata.description: FoundryNet Claude Code plugins — MINT Protocol work attestation plus the FoundryNet Data Network (market, weather, cyber, financial, and crypto intelligence).

plugins.name: mint-attest
plugins.description: Attest completed work on MINT Protocol. Tamper-evident proof that your agent did the work.

plugins.name: foundrynet-market-data
plugins.description: Real-time equity quotes, sector performance, options chains, historical prices, and stock screening from the FoundryNet Data Network.

plugins.name: foundrynet-weather-intelligence
plugins.description: Keyless weather + climate intelligence (Open-Meteo + NWS) — current conditions, severe alerts, forecasts, climate normals, and agricultural outlooks.

plugins.name: foundrynet-cyber-intelligence
plugins.description: CVE lookup with exploit-probability (EPSS) + CISA KEV, IP/domain threat reputation, and daily threat briefs from the FoundryNet Data Network.

plugins.name: foundrynet-financial-intelligence
plugins.description: Real-time market signals, insider-trading detection, earnings analysis, and composite stock scoring from the FoundryNet Data Network.

plugins.name: foundrynet-crypto-intelligence
plugins.description: Real-time crypto prices, market overview, DeFi metrics, and whale-movement alerts from the FoundryNet Data Network.
